headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Henry Schein (HSIC) Board Overhaul After Bergman’s Retirement
summary: Henry Schein, Inc. has announced that following its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, its Board of Directors will shrink from fifteen to ten members as longtime director and former chairman Stanley M. Bergman retires after 44 years, alongside four other directors who will not stand for reelection. Bergman’s retirement and the concentrated board reshaping mark a significant governance shift for the company, raising important questions about continuity, oversight, and future leadership...

headline: A Look At Henry Schein (HSIC) Valuation As Board Overhaul Reshapes Governance
summary: Board overhaul puts governance in focus for Henry Schein (HSIC) Henry Schein (HSIC) has put governance in the spotlight after announcing that longtime Chairman Stanley M. Bergman will retire and several directors will step down, which will shrink the Board from fifteen to ten members. See our latest analysis for Henry Schein. At a share price of US$75.53, Henry Schein has seen short term share price pressure, with a 30 day share price return of a 3.29% decline and a 90 day share price return...
